title: You Never Had It: An Evening with Bukowski
original_title: You Never Had It: An Evening With Bukowski
overview: A long night spent drinking, smoking, and talking about sex, literature, childhood and humanity with irreverent writer poet Charles Bukowski in his California home in 1981. A story of video tapes lost, then found, and brought back to life.
